name: general-baseline
description: Utility: collect a GENERAL imatrix (broad benchy mix) to contrast domain imatrices against
_note: Not for quantizing — just run `forgequant.py imatrix general-baseline` to produce general.dat from a broad, multi-domain corpus (MMLU-Pro + SuperGPQA + HumanEval + MedXpertQA + TruthfulQA). Domain recipes with a `contrast` boost point `boost.baseline` here: the boost then upcasts the layers a domain uses DIFFERENTLY from this general baseline.
